mapper.select: SELECT ma.id as id FROM md_role_auth mra JOIN md_auth ma ON mra.auth_id = ma.id WHERE mra.role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT ma.id AS id, ma.name AS NAME, ma.`status` AS authStatus, mp.name AS groupName, mp.id AS groupId FROM md_auth ma LEFT JOIN md_auth_group mag ON ma.id = mag.auth_id LEFT JOIN md_group mp ON mag.group_id = mp.id WHERE ma.app_id = #{appId} ORDER BY mp.sort ASC

SELECT ma.id AS id, ma.name AS NAME, ma.`status` AS authStatus, mp.name AS groupName, mp.id AS groupId FROM md_role_auth mra JOIN md_auth ma ON mra.auth_id = ma.id LEFT JOIN md_auth_group mag ON ma.id = mag.auth_id LEFT JOIN md_group mp ON mag.group_id = mp.id WHERE mra.role_id = #{roleId} and ma.status = 1 ORDER BY mp.sort ASC
